comment_text.sn22.64:1.4: To “conceive” or “imagine” (maññati) is, according to the commentary, to think in terms of a “self”, proliferating experience through craving, conceit, or views until it is constructed for me. This usage draws upon such passages as Bṛhadāraṇyaka Upaniṣad 4.3.20, where due to ignorance, a person “imagines” in a dream the fearful things they saw when awake, or at the highest level, “imagines I am this all” (ahamevedaṁ sarvo’smīti manyate). See MN 1:3.3.

root_text.sn22.64:1.2: Atha kho aññataro bhikkhu …pe… ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn22.64:1.3: “sādhu me, bhante, bhagavā saṅkhittena dhammaṁ desetu …pe… ātāpī pahitatto vihareyyan”ti.
root_text.sn22.64:2.1: “Yathā kathaṁ pana tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsī”ti?
root_text.sn22.64:2.9: Imassa khvāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāmī”ti.
root_text.sn22.64:3.2: Sādhu kho tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsi.
root_text.sn22.64:3.3: Rūpaṁ kho, bhikkhu, maññamāno baddho mārassa;
root_text.sn22.64:3.10: Imassa kho, bhikkhu, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena attho daṭṭhabbo”ti …pe…
root_text.sn22.64:3.11: aññataro ca pana so bhikkhu arahataṁ ahosīti.

translation_text.sn22.64:1.2: Then a mendicant went up to the Buddha … and asked him,
translation_text.sn22.64:1.3: “Sir, may the Buddha please teach me Dhamma in brief. When I’ve heard it, I’ll live alone, withdrawn, diligent, keen, and resolute.”
translation_text.sn22.64:1.4: “When you conceive, mendicant, you’re bound by Māra.
translation_text.sn22.64:1.5: Not conceiving, you’re free from the Wicked One.”
translation_text.sn22.64:2.1: “But how do you see the detailed meaning of my brief statement?”
translation_text.sn22.64:2.2: “Sir, when you conceive form you’re bound by Māra.
translation_text.sn22.64:2.3: Not conceiving, you’re free from the Wicked One.
translation_text.sn22.64:2.8: Not conceiving, you’re free from the Wicked One.
translation_text.sn22.64:2.9: That’s how I understand the detailed meaning of the Buddha’s brief statement.”
translation_text.sn22.64:3.2: It’s good that you understand the detailed meaning of what I’ve said in brief like this.
translation_text.sn22.64:3.3: When you conceive form you’re bound by Māra.
translation_text.sn22.64:3.4: Not conceiving, you’re free from the Wicked One.
translation_text.sn22.64:3.9: Not conceiving, you’re free from the Wicked One.
translation_text.sn22.64:3.10: This is how to understand the detailed meaning of what I said in brief.” …
translation_text.sn22.64:3.11: And that mendicant became one of the perfected.
